---
title: "The Rev. Richard Hurrell Froude"
---

## The Rev. Richard Hurrell Froude

**Dates:** (1803-1836)

### Description

theologian, son of the Ven. Richard Hurrell Froude,  friend of Newman and Keble

### Letters

- Letter from [1891]
- Letter from May 24, 1850
- Letter from May 4, 1850
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
